attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY AS RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY,
COALESCE(SRC.QUANTITY, 0.000000) AS RCVD_SUBINVENTORY_LOCATION_QTY,
SRC.RECEIPT_DATE AS RECEIPT_DTM,
COALESCE(SRC.TO_SUBINVENTORY, 'UNKNOWN') AS DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY_NAME,
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY, -999) AS DESTINATION_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,      
(CASE WHEN NSS.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE

FROM
(
SELECT 
SCRS.QUANTITY, 
SCRS.RECEIPT_DATE,
SCRS.TO_SUBINVENTORY,
SCRS.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCRS.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
SCRS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SUPPLY SCRS
WHERE 
SCRS.SUPPLY_TYPE_CODE = 'RECEIVING'

/* Removed as part of SJ PROD Sunset
UNION ALL

SELECT 
SMRS.QUANTITY,
SMRS.RECEIPT_DATE,
SMRS.TO_SUBINVENTORY,
SMRS.GLOBAL_NAME,
SMRS.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
SMRS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_MF_RCV_SUPPLY SMRS
WHERE 
SMRS.SUPPLY_TYPE_CODE = 'RECEIVING'

UNION ALL 

SELECT 
EMRS.QUANTITY,
EMRS.RECEIPT_DATE,
EMRS.TO_SUBINVENTORY,
EMRS.GLOBAL_NAME,
EMRS.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
EMRS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_RCV_SUPPLY EMRS
WHERE 
EMRS.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'   */

UNION ALL

SELECT 
ECRS.QUANTITY,
ECRS.RECEIPT_DATE,
ECRS.TO_SUBINVENTORY,
ECRS.GLOBAL_NAME,
ECRS.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID,
ECRS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_RCV_SUPPLY ECRS
WHERE 
ECRS.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
)SRC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SRC.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
ON ( NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SRC.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID )
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION NRT 
ON (NRT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE AND NRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  = SRC.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLDB.N_RCVNG_TRX_SUBINV_LOCATION NSS 
ON NSS.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY = NRT.RECEIVING_TRANSACTION_KEY

SELECT SCRS.SUPPLY_TYPE_CODE, SCRS.SUPPLY_SOURCE_ID, SCRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, SCRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, SCRS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, SCRS.CREATED_BY, SCRS.CREATION_DATE, SCRS.REQUEST_ID, SCRS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, SCRS.PROGRAM_ID, SCRS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, SCRS.REQ_HEADER_ID, SCRS.REQ_LINE_ID, SCRS.PO_HEADER_ID, SCRS.PO_RELEASE_ID, SCRS.PO_LINE_ID, SCRS.PO_LINE_LOCATION_ID, SCRS.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID, SCRS.SHIPMENT_HEADER_ID, SCRS.SHIPMENT_LINE_ID, SCRS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID, SCRS.ITEM_ID, SCRS.ITEM_REVISION, SCRS.QUANTITY, SCRS.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRS.TO_ORG_PRIMARY_QUANTITY, SCRS.TO_ORG_PRIMARY_UOM, SCRS.RECEIPT_DATE, SCRS.DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE, SCRS.LOCATION_ID, SCRS.FROM_ORGANIZATION_ID, SCRS.FROM_SUBINVENTORY, SCRS.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID, SCRS.TO_SUBINVENTORY, SCRS.INTRANSIT_OWNING_ORG_ID, SCRS.CHANGE_FLAG, SCRS.CHANGE_TYPE, SCRS.OE_ORDER_HEADER_ID, SCRS.OE_ORDER_LINE_ID, SCRS.TO_LOCATOR_ID, SCRS.LPN_ID, SCRS.SECONDARY_QUANTITY, SCRS.SECONDARY_UNIT_OF_MEASURE, SCRS.GES_UPDATE_DATE, SCRS.GLOBAL_NAME, SCRS.BATCH_ID, SCRS.CREATE_DATETIME, SCRS.ACTION_CODE, 'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_CG1_RCV_SUPPLY SCRS
 WHERE
SCRS.SUPPLY_TYPE_CODE = 'RECEIVING'
 AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC WHERE  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCRS.GLOBAL_NAME )
 OR NOT EXISTS  ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO WHERE NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SCRS.TO_ORGANIZATION_ID)
 OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLDB.N_RECEIVING_TRANSACTION NRT, $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC WHERE NRT.SS_CD = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 
 AND NRT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT  = SCRS.RCV_TRANSACTION_ID AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SCRS.GLOBAL_NAME ))
